'''shawadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:noblebright|noblebright]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-w-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:noblebright|noblebright]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shawadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæwædhæth|shæwædhæth]] || [[word:shæwædhæj|shæwædhæj]] || [[word:shæwædhæsh|shæwædhæsh]] || [[word:shæwædhæ|shæwædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shawawadhath|shawawadhath]] || [[word:shawawadhaj|shawawadhaj]] || [[word:shawawadhash|shawawadhash]] || [[word:shawawadha|shawawadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shawadhath|shawadhath]] || [[word:shawadhaj|shawadhaj]] || [[word:shawadhash|shawadhash]] || [[word:shawadha|shawadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shawafdhath|shawafdhath]] || [[word:shawafdhaj|shawafdhaj]] || [[word:shawafdhash|shawafdhash]] || [[word:shawafdhaf|shawafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shawadhatha|shawadhatha]] || [[word:shawadhaja|shawadhaja]] || [[word:shawadhasha|shawadhasha]] || [[word:shawadhaka|shawadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shawadhath|shawadhath]] || [[word:shawadhaj|shawadhaj]] || [[word:shawadhash|shawadhash]] || [[word:shawadha|shawadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shawadhathal|shawadhathal]] || [[word:shawadhajal|shawadhajal]] || [[word:shawadhashal|shawadhashal]] || [[word:shawadhakal|shawadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shawadhathatha|shawadhathatha]] || [[word:shawadhajaja|shawadhajaja]] || [[word:shawadhashasha|shawadhashasha]] || [[word:shawadhaka|shawadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shawadhathan|shawadhathan]] || [[word:shawadhajan|shawadhajan]] || [[word:shawadhashan|shawadhashan]] || [[word:shawadhakan|shawadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shawadhathaoro|shawadhathaoro]] || [[word:shawadhajaoro|shawadhajaoro]] || [[word:shawadhashaoro|shawadhashaoro]] || [[word:shawadhakaoro|shawadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
